tasks.subject: Task 3: Fix 3 — Abort _relaunch_oom_crawl if status not restarting_oom
tasks.description:
Re-read Redis status at top of _relaunch_oom_crawl; abort if not restarting_oom. Commit c1fca671.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestRelaunchAbort -v", "commitSha": "c1fca671"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Fix 4 — Skip OOM path in _monitor_process if status is terminal
tasks.description:
